violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply for to have a Rhode Island Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Food was moved at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
The drain stoppers for the 3-bay sink were not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
The outside refuse area was observed with an accumulation of debris and rodent burrows. Refuse areas must be maintained as frequently as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings and burrows located in the receptacle area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Establishment is to continue to work with pest control - Establishment is to follow pest control guidance to fill and eliminate burrows. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the oven, and freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
The dumpster area outside was observed with an accumulation of droppings, Dumpster areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The floor is the establishment have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
